# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_zone (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `advertise_subnets` (Boolean) Advertise EVPN subnets if you have silent hosts.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `bridge` (String) Specify the bridge interface to use.
- `bridge_disable_mac_learning` (Boolean) Disable auto MAC address learning on the bridge interface.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `controller` (String) FRR router name.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `dhcp` (String) Type of the DHCP backend for this zone.
- `disable_arp_nd_suppression` (Boolean) Disable IPv4 ARP and IPv6 neighbour discovery suppression.
- `dns` (String) DNS API server.
- `dnszone` (String) DNS domain zone.
- `dp_id` (Number) Faucet dataplane ID.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `exitnodes` (String) List of cluster node names.
- `exitnodes_local_routing` (Boolean) Allow exitnodes to connect to EVPN guests.
- `exitnodes_primary` (String) Force traffic to this exit node first.
- `fabric` (String) SDN fabric to use as underlay for this VXLAN zone. Either `fabric` or `peers` is required for VXLAN zones.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ipam` (String) Use a specific IPAM.
- `mac` (String) Anycast logical router MAC address.
- `mtu` (Number) Set the Maximum Transmission Unit (MTU).
- `nodes` (String) List of cluster node names.
- `peers` (String) Peers address list (comma-separated IP addresses). Either `fabric` or `peers` is required for VXLAN zones. Example: 192.168.0.1,192.168.0.2,192.168.0.3
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `reversedns` (String) Reverse DNS API server.
- `rt_import` (String) Route-Target import.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) The desired state of the zone configuration.
- `tag` (Number) Service-VLAN tag.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) Specify the type of zone.
- `update` (Boolean) If `state=present` and zone exists it'll update.
- `vlan_protocol` (String) Specify the VLAN protocol to use.
- `vrf_vxlan` (Number) Specify the VRF VXLAN identifier.
- `vxlan_port` (Number) VXLAN tunnel UDP port (default 4789).
- `zone` (String) Unique zone name.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
